description_long: This is a two-story suburban house surrounded by a wooden privacy fence and set on a rectangular grassy lot. The front facade features a prominent entryway with a covered porch, flanked by symmetrical windows with red shutters and a single-car garage to the left. The exterior walls are clad in light-colored siding, with a darker horizontal band separating the two floors. The rear of the house includes large windows and a back patio area, providing ample natural light to the interior. The roof is flat, and the property includes paved walkways leading to both the front and back doors. The overall design is clean and functional, with a focus on symmetry and suburban residential comfort.
description: A two-story suburban house with light siding, red shutters, a garage, and a fenced grassy yard. The design is symmetrical and features a flat roof and large windows.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, garage, symmetrical windows with red shutters, and a paved walkway.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the garage side, side door, and the continuation of the fence and yard.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting large windows, a back patio, and the fenced backyard.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the side wall, windows, and the yard extending to the back.
attribute_entryway_design: Central covered entry with steps, flanked by columns and decorative shutters, leading to a single front door.
